message:
fix: replace local path deps with git URLs in [patch.crates-io] (closes #181, closes #183)

Standalone cargo install and source builds were broken because
Cargo.toml used path = "../frankensqlite/crates/..." which only
works on this specific machine's directory layout.

Switched all 18 fsqlite crates + fastmcp-rust to git URL deps
pointing to their GitHub repos. CI already clones frankensqlite
alongside, so this is backwards compatible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
